Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Groupers To Go
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Groupers to Go
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this week's episode, we head out with a goal to catch Alaskan Salmon, Lingcod, and all types of other rockfish, but first, we have some more fun in the Halibut grounds while we wait for the wind to calm down.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter, Part 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Walleye fishing early spring walleye in the Ivanhoe River.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Ivanhoe Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Sierra Nevada mountain range in California is home to many lakes with excellent trout fishing. Thanks to Shea's father, Patt McIntee, June Lake has been a favorite for decades. We spend some time fishing both June Lake and Lake Crowley. Then later, we fish a lake that is brand new to us.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - We Love Fishing the High Sierras, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hook n' Look returns to Carter's Lake with guide, Louie Bartenfield. He and host, Kim Stricker employ TG Finesse Football Jigs along steep banks and the endeavor pays off with some southern bling!
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Georgia Jewelry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A great day of Fall Fishing on Kenogamissi Lake with a young inspiring Angler.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Fall Fishing on Kenogamissi Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On 9/11/2001, Bryan Anderson started basic training with the U.S. Army. A few months later he would find himself in the middle of the Iraq War as a military police officer. An IED Explosion would change his life forever, and Bryan would begin his new life as a triple amputee.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Bryan Anderson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Midwest Border War
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Finger Lakes Showdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and the crew spend day two of their two and a half-day fishing trip on the El Dorado sportfishing boat out of Long Beach Sportfishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Bluefin Tuna and Yellowtail Fishing on the El Dorado, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeremy Smith take to the Great Plains in search of giant smallmouth bass, demonstrating how a one-two punch of trolling and casting jerkbaits can yield big rewards.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling - Jerkin' Smallies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw proves why lipless crankbaits are must-have weapons in the bass angler's arsenal.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Lipless in Kissimmee
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's Musky time! This week, we're meeting up with our good friend Jeff Van Remortel to try and catch a giant! Big fish, great tips, and good times this week, so hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Big Water Muskies

Video.summary: Larry takes us on the clear waters of Lake Michigan for some amazing salmon fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Charter Boating Milwaukee

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Finding Pre-Spawn Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Bluebird Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the Stoked on Fishing crew as they travel to incredible fishing destinations, chase down a wide variety of species, and share the stories of the people and places behind each catch. Whether it’s offshore, inshore, freshwater, or somewhere off the beaten path, every episode brings you along for the adventure — with real anglers, real conditions, and no scripted nonsense.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat Fishing on the Ranger 85 (Part 3)
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with Pro Angler Jeff Sprague about his success this season
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Jeff Sprague
Video.title: Episode 1
